overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a character breaking into a vehicle in the desert badlands, followed by a scenic drive along the highway toward Night City with moderate traffic and a prominent 'VOTE' billboard visible against the skyline.

events.description: character breaks the passenger window of the black sedan with a tool
character stands up from the crouched position and begins walking away from the vehicle

agents.ego_description: breaking into the black car then walking along the desert roadside with another character

notable_agents.action: breaking car window with a tool while crouched
walking past the vehicle wearing red lingerie and roller skates

entered.detail: futuristic black car with chrome accents and broken passenger window
large industrial wind turbines scattered across the desert hills
utility poles with power lines running parallel to the road
unpaved desert path with sparse vegetation

segments.scene_description: In the desert badlands, a character with red hair breaks into a black luxury sedan while another character in red lingerie walks by. The scene features wind turbines and power lines against a clear morning sky as the characters move away from the vehicle along the dirt roadside.

events.description: perspective shifts from third-person character view to highway roadside tracking shot
green sports car passes by at high speed on the highway
black sedan overtakes the camera position on the right side

agents.ego_description: traveling along the highway shoulder observing passing traffic and the approaching city skyline

notable_agents.action: green sports car driving past at high speed
black sedan overtaking on the right lane

entered.detail: wet asphalt multi-lane road with visible tire marks and puddles
futuristic cityscape with tall glass towers and industrial structures
large political billboard with 'VOTE' text and portrait against the hillside
metal guardrail running along the roadside

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a highway tracking shot moving toward Night City. The asphalt road stretches ahead with moderate traffic including sports cars and sedans passing by. A prominent 'VOTE' billboard stands on the right hillside while the futuristic city skyline dominates the horizon under warm morning light.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway with dense traffic approaching urban center

events.description: military-style truck passes by on the left lane
multiple vehicles including a yellow car pass in quick succession

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway with the city skyline growing larger in the distance

notable_agents.action: military truck with green paint driving past on the highway

segments.scene_description: The camera continues driving along the highway as the Night City skyline appears closer and more detailed. Various vehicles including a military truck pass by while the 'VOTE' billboard moves out of frame behind. The guardrail remains a constant feature on the left as the urban landscape ahead becomes more prominent.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a secluded desert roadside into a high-speed journey toward a sprawling futuristic metropolis. It begins in the badlands, where a red-haired character breaks into a black luxury sedan as another figure in red lingerie walks past amidst a landscape of wind turbines and power lines. As the characters move away from the vehicle along the dirt shoulder, the perspective shifts seamlessly into a tracking shot along a paved highway. The scene then expands to reveal moderate traffic with sports cars and sedans streaming forward under warm morning light. Finally, the road opens up to show a prominent VOTE billboard on the hillside before the massive skyline of Night City dominates the horizon.

The shot follows a continuous drive along a highway as the distant horizon gradually transforms into a detailed urban sprawl. It begins with the camera moving steadily forward, passing a prominent VOTE billboard that slowly recedes out of frame. As the vehicle progresses, the Night City skyline grows increasingly larger and more intricate against the sky, while a military truck and other traffic stream past. The scene then shifts focus toward the encroaching city limits, with the constant presence of the left-side guardrail guiding the eye toward the expanding metropolitan landscape.
